steps.heading: Find an Apartment Fast - 4 Steps, No Sign-up Required

items.title: Find an apartment that fits your needs
items.experience: Browse our platform to see a real portfolio of serviced apartments with full details, genuine photos, and publicly listed prices.
items.privilege: No sign-up required. You can freely browse apartment listings on Kim Housing's platform without providing any personal information.

items.title: Connect with a consultant & book a free viewing
items.experience: Once you've found an apartment you like, simply tap the contact button to quickly book a viewing, completely free of charge.
items.privilege: A Kim Housing consultant will reach out for in-depth advice and personally take you to see the actual apartment.

items.title: Place a secure holding deposit
items.experience: Once you decide to rent, our specialist will help you set up a clear, transparent Deposit Receipt. You can transfer the deposit directly to the landlord or authorize Kim Housing's official deposit-holding account to receive it on your behalf.
items.privilege: Kim Housing commits to settling and transferring the full deposit amount to the landlord within 24 working hours, guaranteeing complete safety for your holding deposit.

items.title: Move in and sign your lease
items.experience: A Kim Housing specialist will support you throughout signing the official lease with the landlord.
items.privilege: The holding deposit receipt automatically expires once the lease is signed. Move in and start your new chapter with peace of mind.

cards.title: Real photos, real prices
cards.description: Every listing has verified photos and pricing - no fake listings.

cards.title: Free for tenants
cards.description: You pay no brokerage fee when finding and booking apartment viewings through Kim Housing.

cards.title: Fast response
cards.description: Our consulting team reaches out and arranges viewings as quickly as possible.

cards.title: Coverage across Ho Chi Minh City
cards.description: A diverse portfolio of apartments across every district, updated continuously every day.

hero.title: Renting Made Transparent and Easy
hero.description: Kim Housing is a serviced apartment rental brand in Ho Chi Minh City, connecting tenants with apartments that match their listings and real prices, with a fast room-viewing booking experience.

intro.heading: With You on Your Journey Home
intro.paragraph1: Kim Housing officially began operating on January 1, 2026, with the goal of building a transparent, dedicated, and professional serviced apartment rental brand. We believe a good home starts with honest information, clear pricing, and a team that's always ready to help.
intro.paragraph2: From room consulting and contract support to customer care throughout the rental period, Kim Housing builds a closed-loop service ecosystem so tenants can rent with peace of mind and landlords can hand over operations with confidence.

brandMeaning.heading: Why KIM HOUSING?
brandMeaning.paragraph1: In Vietnamese, KIM means "value" - exactly what Kim Housing wants to deliver to every customer. KIM also means metal, or diamond: enduring through time, much like how we choose to stand by our tenants and landlords for the long run.

letters.title: Kaizen
letters.description: A spirit of continuous improvement, getting better every day.

letters.title: Interaction
letters.description: People are at the center of every connection.

letters.title: Mission
letters.description: A long-term mission, focused on depth.

brandMeaning.lettersNote: The letter I sits at the center, representing people - the focus of every value Kim Housing creates.
brandMeaning.paragraph2: By putting the team's depth of growth at the center, Kim Housing believes this is the foundation for quality service and real value for customers.
brandMeaning.rotateHint: Drag or tap the emblem to rotate it.

milestones.title: KIM HOUSING Officially Launches
milestones.description: After a period of preparation, Kim Housing officially began operating on January 1, 2026, marking the launch of a serviced apartment rental brand in Ho Chi Minh City. From day one, Kim Housing has made transparency and the tenant experience its core values in everything it does.

milestones.title: Finalizing the Platform & Team
milestones.description: In the final months of 2025, the Kim Housing team focused on finalizing operating processes, building an apartment management system, and recruiting staff for consulting and customer care roles, getting ready for the official launch.

milestones.title: Shaping the Service Direction
milestones.description: By mid-2025, Kim Housing's service direction had taken clear shape: from the serviced apartment rental model, to room consulting, to landlord partnerships - all working toward a complete ecosystem for tenants in Ho Chi Minh City.

milestones.title: The Idea Takes Shape
milestones.description: The idea for Kim Housing began with a desire to build a transparent, dedicated serviced apartment rental brand that puts tenants' interests first - a gap the founding team saw remained in the market.

hero.title: Social Responsibility
hero.description: Growth tied to responsibility toward customers, partners, and the community.

intro.heading: Sustainable, Responsible Growth
intro.paragraph: From its earliest days, Kim Housing has treated social responsibility not as a campaign but as part of how it operates every day - from transparent information for tenants, to fairness with landlord partners, to caring for its staff and the surrounding community.

commitmentsSection.heading: Kim Housing's Four Pillars of Responsibility

commitments.title: To Tenants
commitments.description: Transparent apartment information, rental pricing, and contracts. We don't let tenants bear the risk of misleading listings or unclear extra costs.

commitments.title: To Landlord Partners
commitments.description: A commitment to transparent cash flow, legal support, and responsible operations when landlords trust us with managing their property.

commitments.title: To Our Staff
commitments.description: Building a fair workplace, providing thorough training, and creating long-term growth opportunities for every Kim Housing team member.

commitments.title: To the Community
commitments.description: Working toward being a responsible serviced apartment brand in Ho Chi Minh City, supporting meaningful activities for the community where Kim Housing operates.

cta.heading: Build a Trustworthy Rental Community with Kim Housing
cta.paragraph: If you have a partnership proposal or feedback on Kim Housing's sustainable growth direction, please get in touch with us.

founders.heading: Led by an Experienced Team
founders.paragraph: Kim Housing was founded by a team with years of experience in rental real estate, united by a shared vision to build a transparent, dedicated, and professional serviced apartment brand in Ho Chi Minh City.

coreTeam.heading: 30+ Experienced Staff
coreTeam.paragraph: Alongside its founding team, Kim Housing brings together more than 30 core staff with years of experience in serviced apartment sales across Ho Chi Minh City. Deeply familiar with the market and each rental area, the Kim Housing team is always ready to advise and support tenants in finding the apartment that fits them best.

hero.title: Core Values
hero.description: The foundational values guiding every decision and action of the Kim Housing team.

values.title: Transparency
values.description: Rental pricing, apartment photos, and contract terms are all clear and public - no hidden costs throughout the rental period.

values.title: Dedication
values.description: Tenant satisfaction and experience come first in every decision, from room consulting to after-signing care.

values.title: Professionalism
values.description: Operations, consulting, and contract signing processes are standardized by a team with deep experience in rental real estate.

values.title: Innovation
values.description: Continuously applying technology to management and room search, making the serviced apartment rental journey faster and more convenient.

values.title: Responsibility
values.description: A commitment to standing by tenants, landlord partners, and the community where Kim Housing operates, working toward sustainable growth.

values.title: Collaboration
values.description: Building mutually beneficial partnerships with landlords - transparent cash flow, optimized occupancy, and legal peace of mind.

cta.heading: Values Reflected in Every Experience
cta.paragraph: From the moment you start searching to the moment you're settled in, Kim Housing upholds these values at every touchpoint with tenants and partners.

cta.heading: Need the Right Service for You?
cta.paragraph: Whether you're a tenant looking for an apartment or a landlord looking to partner with us, Kim Housing is ready to help.

sections.s1P1: This Personal Data Protection Policy sets out the standards for collecting, storing, processing, protecting, and sharing the personal data of users (including tenants and landlord/leasing partners) across Kim Housing's entire data system. As both Data Controller and Data Processor, Kim Housing is committed to strictly complying with Vietnamese data protection law (in particular the 2025 Law on Personal Data Protection and Decree No. 356/2025/ND-CP dated December 31, 2025).
sections.s2_1P1: Kim Housing keeps its platform open. Users may access and look up serviced apartment information completely free of charge and anonymously, without any requirement to register an account or log in.
sections.s2_1P2: By actively submitting information through our contact channels (hotline, Zalo OA), registering for a service, or signing transaction forms (Deposit Receipt, Room Transfer Form), users are deemed to have confirmed and consented to Kim Housing collecting and processing their personal data under the terms of this policy.
sections.s2_2Intro: Personal data is classified as follows:
sections.s2_2Item1: The system automatically records non-identifying information such as temporary IP address, device type, operating system, web browser, access time, and general activity history on the website, for the purpose of improving system performance and user experience.
sections.s2_2Item2a: Full name, ID card/passport number, mobile phone number, permanent address, bank account information (for preferential support services), number of co-residing household members, and number of vehicles.
sections.s2_2Item2b: Full name, ID card/passport number, phone number, rental building address, and account information for receiving the holding deposit.
sections.s2_2Item2c: Full name, phone number, and employee ID.
sections.s2_3Heading: 3. Purpose and scope of information use
sections.s2_3Intro: Personal data collected is used only for the following lawful purposes:
sections.s2_3Item1: Drafting, cross-checking, and retaining legal transaction records, including the Deposit Receipt, Room Transfer Form, and Transaction Confirmation Form.
sections.s2_3Item2: Verifying the identity of tenants and landlords to prevent financial fraud, fake listings, or deposit scams.
sections.s2_3Item3: Providing tenants' personal information to the lessor to complete temporary residence/absence registration with local police authorities, as required by residency law.
sections.s2_3Item4: Integrating data to manage loyalty-point accounts on Zalo OA; sending promotional programs and service vouchers from ecosystem partners. Providing contact information implies consent to share limited basic information with these partners to activate offers.
sections.s2_4Heading: 4. Security and data-transfer commitments (per Article 7, Decree No. 356/2025/ND-CP)
sections.s2_4P1: Kim Housing is committed to fully safeguarding users' personal data. We do not sell or trade personal data to third parties for commercial purposes without the user's written consent.
sections.s2_4P2: In compliance with Article 7 of Decree No. 356/2025/ND-CP, when transferring users' personal data to a third party (landlord/building manager or ecosystem partner), Kim Housing applies the following measures:
sections.s2_4Item1: Establishing a clear written agreement/terms with the data recipient (landlord/manager or partner), specifying: the purpose of transfer, the type of data transferred, the data retention period, the legal basis for processing, each party's data-protection responsibilities, responsibility for fulfilling data subjects' rights, and the coordination mechanism in the event of an incident or violation.
sections.s2_4Item2Label: Limited purpose and scope of use:
sections.s2_4Item2: The data recipient may only process personal data for the committed transfer purpose, consistent with its registered business line, and may not further transfer it to a fourth party without the consent of both Kim Housing and the data subject.
sections.s2_4Item3: For linked data-sharing activities that generate economic benefit or ancillary services, Kim Housing sets up a clear technical interface or confirmation mechanism so users can give precise, per-service consent.
sections.s2_4Item4: Providing data upon the written request of police authorities or competent state administrative agencies for residency management purposes.
sections.s2_5Heading: 5. Storage, protection, and technical security measures
sections.s2_5P1: Transaction data is securely stored on internal servers for a maximum of two (2) years from the date the transaction ends, for the purpose of financial reconciliation and resolving any complaints or disputes that may arise. After this period, identifying data is deleted or fully anonymized.
sections.s2_5P2: Data is digitized and centrally managed in an internal database with strict access controls. Sales specialists may only access information for the group of customers they are directly responsible for.
sections.s2_5P3: Users are responsible for safeguarding their own transaction information and deposit records. Kim Housing is not liable for any loss resulting from a user voluntarily disclosing transaction or account information to a third party outside the system's authority.
sections.s2_6Heading: 6. Data subject rights and response time
sections.s2_6Intro: Users have the full rights of a data subject under Decree No. 356/2025/ND-CP, including:
sections.s2_6Item1: The right to request review, updating, or correction of personal information.
sections.s2_6Item2: The right to withdraw consent to data processing or request restricted processing.
sections.s2_6Item3: The right to request complete deletion of personal data from Kim Housing's internal storage systems.
sections.s2_6P1: All requests relating to personal data rights may be sent to kimhousing.hrad@gmail.com or submitted in person at the Kim Housing office (14/5A5 Ky Dong Street, Nhieu Loc Ward, Ho Chi Minh City).
sections.s2_6P2: Kim Housing is committed to verifying identity and fully processing a valid user request within a maximum of 48 working hours of receipt.
